author: y4rr
content: Plan: Refactor Phase 1A into model-agnostic helpers, fix tolerance to per-element allclose, then attempt the 6 models. CRITICAL OBSERVATION: All 6 candidate ferrotorch models are documented as 'simplified' (no BN in DenseNet, no depthwise conv in MobileNet/EfficientNet, no factorized convs/aux head in Inception, ResNet backbone non-dilated for FCN). Their named_parameters cannot match torchvision state_dict keys. Per pre-flight (failure mode #17 — bug-list completeness fallacy), the right action is to surface this via the strict loader, file issues, and #[ignore] each — NOT to relax the loader to silent-skip mismatched keys.
